content.en:
There are many resources in the Abyss of Despair, and there is even more than one resource comparable to the Eternal Realm Spirit Flower, but almost all of them have some problems, or the increased success rate is not too high.

However, for Ye Tian, it was still an unimaginably huge gain.

Of course, the biggest gain is an Eternal Demon Pillar and the real Red Lin Ancient Spear.

Subsequently, a replica body of Ye Tian brought these resources back.

......

Endless Realms Alliance.

Ye Tian came back and distributed some of these resources to his wife and children.

For example, the Pillar of Eternity.

this day.

Ye Tian called Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue over, and then took out two Eternal Demon Pillars, one was his own, and the other was obtained from the demon seed.

"Stars, stars, these two eternal pillars are for you. "

Ye Tian said.

"Father, this is ......"

Ye Xingchen was shocked.

Ye Tian took out two Eternal Demon Pillars at once, which really shocked him.

"These are two Eternal Demon Pillars, I have something better to replace them, these two Eternal Demon Pillars, I will refine and refine the Eternal Dao Seed for you. Ye Tian said.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue were not polite and accepted it directly.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took out some treasures such as evil vines and gave them to them: "It will take you a long time to refine the Eternal Demon Pillar, and during this period of time, you have used these evil vines and other treasures to refine the Eternal Dao Seed, and the effect is also very good." "

"Yes, Father!"

They answered.

Of course, his wife Xiao Yue also obtained some resources, all of which would help them to strengthen the Eternal Dao Seed, at least they could raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit faster, so as to condense the Eternal Realm Spirit.

However, there is still a problem, and that is that he does not have any other Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance.

Although he said that he had obtained the Xuan Star Realm Spirit Inheritance, he could only inherit it once, and he could not pass it on to others.

"I have to continue to go to the inheritance land of the Xuanxing Holy Gate, and continue to pass the third assessment... ～..."

Ye Tian decided.

He felt that if he kept breaking through, he might be able to completely control the inheritance land, and maybe he would be able to pass the inheritance to others casually.

......

The Land of the Inheritance of the Holy Gate of the Stars.

The replica body that Ye Tian left here took out the Xuanxing Eternal Rod, inserted it into the ancient stone door, and opened the Xuanxing Eternal Rod.

Subsequently, he went in for the third round of assessment.

In the third round of assessment, Ye Tian was besieged by many Eternal Realm God Realm figures.

However, he was so powerful that he easily killed these figures and passed the third round of assessments.

Then, he came to the fourth round of assessment.

In this fourth round of assessment, he encountered a group of Eternal Realm Divine Realm junior powerhouses with Eternal Realm spirits, and the Eternal Realm Spirits possessed by these Eternal Realm Divine Realm junior powerhouses were all Xuan Star Realm snakes, so their combat effectiveness was very strong and their defense was very strong.

Ye Tian fought with them, and without any foreign objects, he also killed them for a long time, and then he killed them.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian came to the fifth round.

In this round of assessment, he faced those Eternal Realm God Realm junior powerhouses who had two Eternal Realm spirits.

Ye Tian's pressure was extremely huge, even comparable to facing Gu Dui.

He had been killing for a long time, his body was severely damaged, and the Eternal Dao Seed was almost burned to the ground, and finally he killed them all.

However, his replica body is also almost scrapped.

If he was replaced by other Eternal Realm God Realm beginner powerhouses, he would definitely not dare to do so, and only he would dare.

Congratulations to the examiners for passing the fifth round of assessment, will the sixth round of assessment be conducted?

"Give up the sixth round of assessments!"

He can't pass the sixth round of assessment now, he has to deal with a large number of strong people comparable to the demon seed Gu Dusk at the same time, and in order to kill Gu Dusk, he besieged multiple copy bodies, killed for a long time, and sacrificed the copy body, so he killed him.

Therefore, his current strength can't deal with a single Gu Dui, let alone deal with a large number of strong people similar to Gu Du at the same time.

After giving up the assessment, the white woman's figure reappeared, leaving behind three treasures.

Two orbs of light and a token.

Ye Tian absorbed the ball of light and obtained two inheritances of the Eternal Realm Spirit.

【Xuanxing Gu Peng】

【Xuanxing Red Dragon】

This is the inheritance of the two upper realm spirits, and it is also the inheritance of the eternal realm spirit that belongs to the Xuanxing Realm Spirit.

In this way, he didn't need to worry about the inheritance of the Eternal Realm Spirit until he cultivated the three Eternal Realm Spirits.

But as before, only he could cultivate these two inheritances, and his own relatives could not cultivate.

Coming out of the Land of Inheritance, Ye Tian began to study this token.

It took him a moment to refine it before he knew what the token was.

"Xuanxing Holy Gate Disciple Order!"

After having this token, it means that he has already given it to a disciple of the Xuanxing Holy Gate.

Moreover, he also got some useful information from this token.

For example, the origin of the Xuanxing Holy Gate!

According to the above information, the Xuanxing Holy Gate used to be a huge force controlling thousands of eternal realms, but in a great war, the Xuanxing Holy Gate collapsed, leaving only a place of inheritance.

And this is one of those places of inheritance.

"I don't know if the Xuanxing Holy Gate is still inherited, but there is a high probability that it is gone, otherwise this inheritance place will not be unattended. Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course.

The Xuanxing Holy Gate is gone, which does not mean that his status as a disciple of the Xuanxing Holy Gate is useless.

For example, if he goes to other ruins of the Xuanxing Holy Gate in the future, this identity will be useful.

Even in this inheritance land, the identity of the disciple of the Xuanxing Holy Gate is also useful, without this identity, he can't control this inheritance land!

"Once the disciple of the Xuanxing Holy Gate has passed the seven rounds of assessments, he will have the highest authority in this inheritance place, which is equivalent to being in charge here. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

And now, although he can't control this place, he can use his identity as a disciple of the Xuanxing Holy Gate to enter the library of this inheritance place, and there are still some ordinary inheritances in it, which can be browsed directly for free, but he can't take it away.

"Even if it's an ordinary inheritance, it's enough for the Terrans!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But he wants to give his relatives a Realm Spirit Inheritance, so he must control this inheritance place, then he must cultivate three Eternal Realm Spirits, then he can hope to pass the seventh round of assessment.

"You have to work hard to cultivate the three Eternal Realm Spirits as soon as possible!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Endless Realms Alliance.

Ye Tian had already refined that Chilin Ancient Spear, rooted it inside the Eternal Dao Seed, and used it to refine his Eternal Dao Seed, and the effect was even better than the Eternal Demon Pillar.
